merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established and the American Embassy opened when Ambassador Paul V. McNutt presented his credentials on Philippine independence day.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on July 4, 1946, when American Ambassador Paul V. McNutt presented his credentials.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the establishment of the Embassy on 1946-07-04, Philippine independence day, when Ambassador McNutt presented credentials.
